profile.name: Agustín Castaño
profile.tagline: Senior Full Stack Engineer & Technical Lead
profile.bio: Senior Full Stack Engineer and Technical Lead with 4+ years of experience delivering scalable, cloud-native web solutions. Passionate about clean architecture, performance optimization, and building high-impact products — from government platforms and B2B automation to award-winning e-commerce. Skilled in designing and leading end-to-end systems with a focus on reliability and minimalist design.

projects.title: Bonvivir E-commerce
projects.description: IWC 2025 Best Wine E-commerce — improved web performance by 60% and led the frontend architecture.

projects.title: AVE — B2B Automation Platform
projects.description: Enterprise B2B automation platform streamlining logistics and supplier workflows for scale.

projects.title: VUCE — Government Backoffice
projects.description: Government backoffice system for Argentina's VUCE (Ventanilla Única de Comercio Exterior).

projects.title: Industrial IoT Integration
projects.description: Real-time industrial IoT data ingestion and monitoring platform integrating hardware sensors with cloud dashboards.

projects.title: Twitter Clone — Vue/Vuex & Firebase
projects.description: Full-featured Twitter clone built with Vue, Vuex state management, and Firebase real-time backend.

projects.title: REST API — Diaries with TypeScript
projects.description: Type-safe REST API for diary management built with TypeScript and Express.

projects.title: Fruit Map
projects.description: Interactive fruit map application built with Svelte SSR, featuring a Stardew Valley aesthetic and View Transitions.
